case_title: CLAY, JOE vs. MCCLELAND, JAMES AKA JIMMY MCCULLAND et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLELLAND, JAMES SUED AS JAMES MCCLELAND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1985 ELLIS ST. #10, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-16-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. PLTF WAIVES THE SUM OF $2,606.56 IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES AS AGREED. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES.
